body_txt: The Ice Queen, and by extension the Defrosting Ice Queen , is a character who is isolated and alone. Maybe they have a tragic past. Maybe it's a Lonely Rich Kid . Perhaps they just don't fit in well with others and have stopped trying. Enter the character who is The Defroster. The Defroster doesn't necessarily think that Loners Are Freaks . Instead, they may see incidents of bullying, or learn of the Ice Queen's tragic past , spotting Cracks in the Icy Façade , and decide that they're going to take the first steps to thaw out that frozen heart. Their reasons may vary. They may be sympathetic, having been through similar hardships themselves . They may have a romantic interest. They may just be the sort of person who can't stand to see others unhappy. Whatever the case, The Defroster will kickstart the process of thawing out the ice princess and making her a part of their group. The defining characteristics of a Defroster are:  Often the first recipient of Now Allowed to Hug or the listener in an Opening-Up Moment . Related to The Heart , The Redeemer , Blithe Spirit , Magnetic Hero , Messianic Archetype , and All-Loving Hero . See also The Powers Of Love , Friendship , Trust and Family , Restored My Faith in Humanity and Befriending the Enemy . Can overlap with Morality Pet .
